MINI MINUTES: Consolidated witn Case No. 420933 Le vs. CCSF, No. 420934 Nino vs. CCSF, and 420932 Ip vs. CCSF. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders consolidated cases dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Candence Yount. (212)
